title: corydalis trachycarpa var. leucostachya
intro: Corydalis trachycarpa var. leucostachya, also known as 'Yan Hu Suo', is a plant species that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including pain relief and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Corydalis trachycarpa var. leucostachya include relief from menstrual cramps, arthritis, and other types of pain, as well as improved sleep quality. Corydalis trachycarpa var. leucostachya can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
